Widget Sync Spec

v0.1.0-draft · status: draft

§1. Sync Requirements

REQ-WS-001: WHEN a widget changes, the system updates the cache.

REQ-WS-001: WHEN the sync fails, retry the operation.

§2. Token Handling

The sync token authenticates each request. The sync-token is rotated daily by the scheduler. A stale auth token is rejected at the edge, and the expired credential must then be refreshed by the client.

§3. Cache Layer

We chose Redis over Memcached because our team already operates a Redis cluster and it supports persistence — this decision was driven by the 2026 Q1 ops review.

#!/usr/bin/env bash
redis-cli SET "widget:$1" "$2" EX 3600
